## Entities.Tasks.IRenderOptions.onMissingVariables property

How to handle missing variables during template rendering - 'ignore': Render with empty values for missing variables - 'warn': Log warning, render with empty values - 'fail': Return Failure result Default: 'warn'

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly onMissingVariables?: ValidationBehavior;
```
